claims.evidence_text: The rise in maximum and minimum temperatures had adverse effect on wheat yield... losses to wheat and irrigated rice are projected to be around 20%... The average rise in temperature for the four GCMs ranged from 1.5 to 2.3 °C for between 2000 and 2050
claims.claim_summary: Climate warming (1.5-2.3 C rise by 2050) projected to reduce wheat yield by ~20% in West Africa, indicating heat sensitivity.
